cb_allow_title: Allow Projekt City to use cookies in this browser?
cb_intro: Projekt City (managed by itsmarian.dev) and its services use cookies and similar technologies to
cb_provide_operate: provide and operate our websites and services securely
cb_recognize_failures: recognize failures and take measures against spam, fraud and abuse
cb_protect_site: comply with legal requirements and protect our visitors
cb_improve_expand: improve our services to provide a consistently better experience
cb_collect_data: collect data on target group interactions and website statistics
cb_save_preferences: save the preferences you made while using the site
cb_enhance_experience: enhance your experience with personalized, relevant advertising from Google and its partners
cb_show_embedded: show you embedded videos, widgets, images or other third-party content
cb_two_types: We distinguish between the following two types of cookies:
cb_required_cookies: Required cookies: Essential for the basic functionality of the website.
cb_optional_cookies: Optional cookies: These are not essential and are deactivated by default.
cb_other_agreements_text: This project is an official part of itsmarian.dev and is fully managed and maintained by this service. By using our services, you acknowledge that this project operates under the management of itsmarian.dev. Please be aware that any misuse of the platform or security violations may lead to restricted access to this project.
cb_more_info: You can manage your preferences below. For full details on data controller information, please see our
cb_necessary_text1: These cookies are strictly necessary for the technical operation, security, and core functionality of the website, such as managing your login session or security tokens.
cb_necessary_text2: Without these, the website cannot function correctly. Under applicable law, these do not require explicit consent as they are vital for the service you requested.
cb_statistics_text: These help us understand how users interact with our website (e.g., which pages are most popular). The data is collected anonymously and is used solely to optimize our content and performance.
cb_preferences_text: Preference cookies enable the website to remember information that changes the way the site behaves or looks, such as your preferred language, region, or customized display settings.
cb_thirdparty_text: We use external integrations like YouTube, Google Maps, or social media widgets. These third parties may set cookies to deliver media content properly. To protect your privacy, these are disabled by default.
cb_marketing_text: Used to track visitors across websites. The intention is to display ads that are relevant and engaging for the individual user and thereby more valuable for publishers and third-party advertisers.
cb_unclassified_text: Unclassified cookies are cookies that we are in the process of classifying, together with the providers of individual cookies.
